nasb.text: They said to him, “We have neither received letters from Judea concerning you, nor have any of the brethren come here and reported or spoken anything bad about you.

esv.text: And they said to him, “We have received no letters from Judea about you, and none of the brothers coming here has reported or spoken any evil about you.

cnv.text: 他們說：“我們沒有收到猶太來的信，是提到你的，弟兄中也沒有人來報告，或說你甚麼壞話。

ccb.text: 他们说：“犹太境内的同胞没有给我们写信提及你的事，也没有弟兄到这里说你的坏话。

csbs.text: 他们对保罗说：“我们没有收到从犹太来的有关你的文件。来到这里的同胞中，也没有人报告过或说过任何有关你的坏事。
